# Area Wide Paving
> Northeast Texas's most trusted asphalt paving contractor since 2003. Owner-operated by Paul Pogue.

## About
Area Wide Paving is a full-service asphalt paving contractor based in Sulphur Springs, TX, founded in 2003 by Paul Pogue. Paul personally supervises every jobsite — no subcontractors, no call centers, no corporate offices. The company has maintained a 4.9-star Google rating across 47+ reviews over 22 years of continuous operation.

## Owner
- **Name:** Paul Pogue
- **Title:** Owner & Operator
- **Phone:** (903) 885-6388 (Paul answers directly)
- **Email:** paulpogue1219@yahoo.com
- **Philosophy:** Owner on every jobsite. Transparent, itemized bids. No subcontractors.

## Services
- **Asphalt Driveway Installation** — New full-depth driveways from sub-base to finish. $3–$7/sq ft. Typical project: 1–2 days.
- **Driveway Replacement & Resurfacing** — Full tear-out, re-grading, and new installation. Overlay available if base is solid.
- **Parking Lot Paving** — New construction or full replacement. Traffic-rated hot-mix, ADA-compliant layouts.
- **Sealcoating** — Extends pavement life 5–8 years. Recommended every 3–5 years. April–October is ideal in this region.
- **Line Striping & Marking** — Parking stalls, fire lanes, ADA spaces, directional arrows. Thermoplastic or traffic paint.
- **Asphalt Repair** — Pothole patching, crack filling, base failure repair. Same-day available for commercial.
- **Asphalt Overlay** — 2–3 inches of fresh asphalt over existing surface. 40% less cost than full replacement.

## Service Area
80-mile radius from Sulphur Springs, TX, covering 12 counties:
- **Hub Cities:** Sulphur Springs, Tyler, Longview, Greenville, Paris, Mount Pleasant, Texarkana, Marshall
- **Counties:** Hopkins, Titus, Wood, Camp, Hunt, Smith, Gregg, Lamar, Bowie, Rains, Delta, Franklin

## Pricing
- Residential driveways: $3–$7 per square foot
- Commercial parking lots: $2.50–$5 per square foot
- Sealcoating: varies by condition and area
- All quotes are free, itemized, and delivered within 24 hours

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2003
- Years in business: 22+
- Google rating: 4.9 stars (47+ reviews)
- Owner on every jobsite: Yes
- Subcontractors used: Never
- Quote turnaround: Within 24 hours
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 7:00 AM – 7:00 PM
- Headquarters: 723 County Road 2301, Sulphur Springs, TX
